name: Restorative Justice Process Intake
description: Restorative justice process intake for facilitators, community organizations, and justice agencies screening a matter for a restorative process — circle, conference, or victim-offender dialogue. Evaluates the harm, party readiness, victim voluntariness, safety conditions, facilitator qualifications, and community support to produce a restorative justice intake profile with process suitability assessment.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
